question.label: Adjacent-team trust
question.name: Adjacent teams — where is the trust not there yet?
question.description: Pins down the specific relationship gaps behind delayed feedback-seeking and cross-team hesitation.

answer: The gap is less technical and more around visible ownership.

assessment.note: Names a specific cause — visible ownership rather than technical ability — which mildly reinforces a growth gap; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'visible ownership' could be unpacked next session.

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.

I can describe Principal impact in general, but this team's bar still feels fuzzy.
I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
